entry.title: Re: JCo IDoc send is waiting for IDoc to complete processing
entry.content:
Well, despite of its name, IDOC_INBOUND_ASYNCHRONOUS is synchronous by nature. I think, in the very beginning it used to be asynchronous, but because of performance reasons (it needed two work processes in times, when processes were scarce) it was made synchronous.

However, do not despair, ye troubled souls, there is a way to make it asynchronous again. First for some background information, you need to read SAP notes 535172 and 555229 (and 180057). And then you need to know an undocumented trick:

  • In transaction WE21 create a Port of Type ABAP-PI (ABAP-PSS in German). The function module specified here, is without relevance, so you can for example enter RFC_PING.

  • On sender side (i.e. JCo IDoc Library) set the field SNDPOR of the IDoc control record to this port.

After that, the IDoc will only be written to the EDI data tables, and processing of the application is triggered in a separate work process (meaning it's processed asynchronously)!

entry.title: Re: Missing purpose string in Info.plist
entry.content:
Another report for the same issue.

Eagerly awaiting a fix!

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps - build service not working since 24 hours
entry.content: Hi Abdullatif, we're currently experiencing issues with the builds and our team is working on it - can you help us and send more information on your issue to buildapps@sap.com, please? Best regards, Laura

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps - build service not working since 24 hours
entry.content: Hi Kapazza, thanks for reporting your issue - our team is on it. Best regards, Laura

entry.title: Re: Gestión de efectos: Presentación de remesa
entry.content:
Hi,

For the specific user, go to the Bill of Exchange Management window. In the Bill of Exchange Management window, check for field 'Status' and from the drop down, select status 'Deposited'. You will see two additional checkboxes for selection/filter. If any is selected, then remove the same.

Do the same for the status 'paid' in the Bill of Exchange Management window.

Run the Bill of Exchange Management and check if all the BoE's appear or not.

Kr,

Jitin

entry.title: Re: Payment run without postings
entry.content:
HI Bohdan, 

A new point and mostly very well-articulated.  

Best Regards

Raj

entry.title: Gestion de Bancos/Asistente de Pago, Indicar ejecución de orden de pago
entry.content:
Hola, hemos realizando una operación rutinaria, en Gestion de Bancos/Asistente de Pago, hemos seleccionada todo como siempre (Fecha del pago, fechas de vencimiento para filtrar los movimientos) y en el último paso, donde nos solicita el modo en el que se desea procesar los resultados. Siempre escogemos Indicar ejecución de orden de pago. De esta manera si algo sale mal podemos modificarlo previamente antes de contabilizarlo y no hay que volver atrás movimientos erróneos.

Pero esta vez para nuestra sorpresa tras filtrar los pagos negativos y dejar los proveedores que necesitamos nos ha saltado este error.

“Ejecución de todas las líneas en ejecución de orden de pago fallida. Véase el informe "Transacciones no incluidas"  [Mensaje 504-149]”

Y al darle al menu de Transacciones no incluidas, no ha salido un informe, sino que sale otro error.

“La fecha no está disponible; modifique los criterios de selección y vuelva a introducirlos  [Mensaje 131-85]”

Tras reiniciar servidor incluido y ver que no había solución hemos probado por grupos de clientes y finalmente hemos revisado que La moneda del proveedor coincide a la del banco. Existen suficientes fondos en el banco asignado al pago. El proveedor o socio de negocio está activo. Lo mismo que las Cuentas.

Hemos probado todo igual, excepto que en el paso donde indicamos el modo en el que se desea procesar los resultados. Hemos seleccionado Indicar ejecución de pago. En este caso nos ha realizado la operación y no sabemos por qué. En este caso se ejecutan más pasos como el registro de todas las órdenes, contabilización de los pagos y seguramente más cosas.

No sabemos a que es debido este cambio en el comportamiento del programa y si podemos usar la opción anterior de nuevo. Si alguien sabe mas sobre este punto o puede aclarar algún concepto estaríamos agradecidos.

entry.title: Re: Header fields of savings form to be used on condition
entry.content: I don't believe so, as conditions typically can only be used within their object. However, you can always check with your deployment lead if the header field from your savings tracker can be replicated and linked in the Contract Workspace. In that case you should be able to use the condition for contract creation.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano  

My name is Vedant Shete and I am currently pursuing Bachelor of Engineering in Computer Engineering department.

This is a golden opportunity for students like me and I want to appreciate for this incredible opportunity offered by SAP. As a student, the cost of certification can be exorbitant, difficult to access such valuable learning resources. However, this chance to obtain a SAP certification for free truly underscore its value.

With the C_SAC_2402 Data Analytics course, I see not just a certification, but an epochal milestone. It's not just about adding a shining badge to my resume; it's more about unlocking doors to great opportunities, shaping my future, and propelling me towards my goals.
Therefore, I extend my heartfelt gratitude. Thank you for your belief in the students like myself, for your investment in our potential, and making our futures bright by such opportunities.

Warm regards,
Vedant Shete

entry.title: Re: Story report issue

entry.title: Having SWIFT code mandatory in SLP
entry.content:
Hello community,

We are looking to make the SWIFT code mandatory in SLP bank repeatable section. We received response from support that this was not possible. We are now looking at other options e.g. having SWIFT code & IBAN outside the bank repeatable section. If you faced a similar issue in the past we would appreciate sharing how you worked around this limitation.

Kind regards,

Louis

am looking for finding a way to route emails from the office 365(cloud) to solman private cloud.

entry.content:

in a new created company code and plant, I comes to material ledger configuratoin, and when I activated materail ledger and do the customer setting checking, I noticed a inconsistency saying "inventory Values not reconciled with FI" as below.  actually there is not any item movement yet. what is this info means? and what should I deal with this info?

thanks in advance~

entry.title: SAP APO DP Planning version bug.
entry.content:
Dear experts sometimes i am facing a problem that after process chain

1) Create CVC

2)Initialize   time series objects, 

3) Adjust time series,

4) Check time series.

5)It starts to load  planning data from cube, and fails with the message "Version 000 does not exist for planning area ZDP90".

But after i restart cube loading step manually it works perfectly.

This happens sometimes and I do not know what it depends on, maybe someone can help me?

entry.title: Re: PREP_GENCHECKS/EU_NAMETAB_CHECK Error during upgrade...
entry.content:
Hi, 
I had the same problem. The problem was that there were differences between DD and DB. It was enough to delete the data in the DBDIFF table, preferably via SE11 Utilities>>Database Utilities>>Clean Data
Zdenek

entry.title: Re: SET CUROSOR FIELD xxx OFFSET yyy doesn't work with filled field and/or without debugging
entry.content: Try the SAP GUI options related to cursor.

entry.title: Unlocking Efficiency and Simplicity: A Look into the New Features of SAP Fiori Elements for OData V4
entry.content:
In the ever-evolving landscape of enterprise software, staying ahead of the curve is not just an advantage, it's a necessity. As we look at SAP Fiori elements, exciting developments  help you to strive, particularly with the features from SAPUI5 Version 1.121 and SAP Fiori elements for OData V4. This latest iteration promises to enhance the capabilities of Fiori elements even further, offering a host of new functionalities and improvements.

Here's a look into some of the latest features for SAP Fiori elements for OData V4:

Recently Entered Values: Have you ever wished for a quicker way to access recently entered values in a field? Well, your wish is granted! We've introduced a handy feature that allows you to view the history of the most recently entered values right within the filter bar.

By simply moving your cursor back to the field, you can enable this time-saving function. While it's automatically activated for controls where it is relevant, like multi-input fields, it might not be enabled for others such as drop-down lists.

With this enhancement, navigating through your data becomes even more efficient, putting valuable information at the top. For more information, see History of Recently Entered Values.

Open Object Page in Edit Mode: One of the standout features in this update is the introduction of the 'openInEditMode' manifest setting. This addition empowers developers by allowing them to open an object page directly in edit mode. Gone are the days of navigating through multiple screens to make a simple edit; now, users can seamlessly transition to edit mode with just a click. For more information, see Navigating to an Object Page in Edit Mode.

Merged Section and Subsection Title: The section or subsection title is now merged with the table or chart title if the section or subsection only has one table or chart control. That way, redundant information is omitted. For more information, see Defining and Adapting Sections.

For all changes, see the What’s New in SAPUI5 1.121 section ‘SAP Fiori elements for OData V4’

entry.title: Unable to connect BAS to S4HANA Public Cloud system
entry.content:
Hello ,

I am trying to connect BAS to a S4HANA public cloud system using SAML assertion destination , by following tutorial : Connect SAP Business Application Studio and SAP S/4HANA Cloud System 

In destination cockpit the destination connects successfully . However , when I am trying to connect to the system ( saml destination ) in BAS ( using adaption project ) , I am getting following error : The system that you have selected cannot be detected to be of type OnPremise or of type CloudReady. You should select system of either of both types in order to continue with the generation of the project.

Is there any configuration that I am missing in the S4HANA cloud system .

entry.title: Re: FIN-FSCM-CR ( Credit Management )-Credit Exposure Category Type 200 (Open Invoices)
entry.content: Hello Emöke, thanks for mentioning the SAP note - very useful! 🙂 Best regards, Carina

entry.title: Re: Consuming CDS View Entities Using ODBC-Based Client Tools
entry.content:
CLIENT=100 worked in my DSN example although I connected to an SAP BTP ABAP Environment system.
In general you should not specify this parameter for an ABAP cloud system. On OnPrem systems it is required.

entry.title: Re: Ignore Hard coding in S4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi, the possible solution is to avoid hardcode in Custom Logic using custom constant interface. It`s using will be not avaiable in the app initially, so you need to release the interface at first to make it avaiable for using. Follow such steps:

  1. Create and activate a constant interface in your system.
  2. Navigate to it`s propeties and click on API State tab. 

  3. Click on green '+' icon on the Use System-Internally (Contract C1) tab.

  4. Select Use in Key User Apps checkbox and click on Next until the end of a dialogue.

     

  5. That`s all, now you are able to use the interface in the Custom Logic App. 

It will work for custom classes as well, so you also can create some kind of singletone buffer-class to store dynamic values. That`s up to your needs.

entry.title: Verwendung des BRTOOLS für Shrinken einer LOB Tabelle vor der Reorg.
entry.content:
Für die Reorganisierung der Tabelle muss vorerst die verknüpfte LOB Tabelle über einen SHRINK Befehl verkleinert werden.

Im normalen DBA Umfeld wäre es dieses Kommando:

ALTER TABLE <table> MODIFY LOB(DATEN) (SHRINK SPACE);

 

Bei SAP Datenbanken soll das BRTOOLS verwendet werden. Die Frage ist, wie das richtig Vorgehen ist, um die LOB Tabelle zu shrinken?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Verwendung des BRTOOLS für Shrinken einer LOB Tabelle...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

With BR*Tools there is no restriction for LOB fields. Only the LONG and LONG RAW fields should be converted into LOB.

You can reorganize the LOB columns with BRSAPCE without shrinking.

Please check below note for more information:

646681 - Reorganization of tables with BRSPACE

Best regards,
SAP Product Support

entry.title: Issue with adaption project in BAS
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

 

We are having an issue with adaption project in BAS.

We are trying to extend a standard Fiori app called "Pack Outbound Deliveries" .  When we open it from the launchpad , it works fine with the user default values. But when we try to open it in BAS, it keeps asking us to set up those user defaults again and again, which is not possible.

It is stuck on the first page itself , but we need to get to the second page to add some new elements using the layout editor.

Could you please help us with this query?

we are unable to access the subaccount in the Europe (Frankfurt) region and getting the below issue.

Rupesh

entry.title: Re: Advanced Intercompany Sales & Stock Transfer in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

currently the intercompany supplier invoice is always createdy by VCM automatically after the goods receipt has been posted in the selling copmany and the ICo customer invoice has been transferred to financial accounting.

We are aware that in some business scenarios it's necessary to stop this automatic creation of the ICo supplier invoice that is not possible in the moment.

We are working on a solution design that enables customers to decide if the automatic creation of the IC supplier invoice by VCM is enabled or disabled.

We plan to share more details in the coming months / quarters.

Best regards,
Bernd

entry.title: Re: The plant is missing for BOM explosion of item xx
entry.content: Double click the line item in VA01/02, then go to the shipping and plant and fill up your plant and save.

Ahmed

entry.title: Re: Call SeriesService_GetDocumentSeries in Service Layer...
entry.content:
Looks you can't directly call the SeriesService_GetDocumentSeries as it's not exposed as a RESTful API.
May you can retrieve the document series by querying the 'Series' entity.

entry.title: Re: SET CUROSOR FIELD xxx OFFSET yyy doesn't work with filled field and/or without debugging
entry.content:
Well, I was not sure. Finally, you answered by yourself so you can post your own answer, and accept your solution 😉

Or maybe I can post the screenshot in English.

entry.title: Re: HANA CV Filter: Process Multi-entry Pattern Input Par...
entry.content: The `LIKE_PREDICATE` function in SAP HANA enables the processing of multiple pattern values within a single filter expression in the Calculation View. This function allows you to use multiple patterns in a single filter expression.

entry.title: Re: ABAP Logic for Splitting one record with Validfrom an...
entry.content:
You can put ValidFrom and ValidTo in a SPMON typped variables (spmon_from,spmon_to).

spmon_from = ValidFrom(6).

Increment of 1 for spmon_from until you reach spmon_to value.

entry.title: Configuration for Label Printing in SSAM 2310
entry.content: As per SSAM 2310 we have Label printing support  which can be enabled through output determination. Can we have any documentation  or blogs link on how to achieve this.

entry.title: Re: SET CUROSOR FIELD xxx OFFSET yyy doesn't work with fi...
entry.content: SAP GUI Options > Interaction Design > Keyboard Settings > Deactivate "Automatically select complete value when entering a field in insert mode (INS)"

entry.title: Assigning Output type for billing document after billing document creation
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I have an requirement like Output type need to assign for SD billing document ( Invoice ) after its creation automatically.

Is there any idea or some one help to achieve this.

It can be enhancement or what ever.

Regards,

Bharathi

entry.title: Re: Not all functions in CMC are working after patching
entry.content: Possible reasons for the issue include server errors, temporary glitches, patching errors, or database connection problems. Troubleshoot by checking server logs, restarting the server, reapplying the patch, checking the database connection.

entry.title: SAP Business Network for Logistics 2403 Release – What’s New?
entry.content:
New features and assets for SAP Business Network for Logistics have been released! With this blog, I would like to share the highlights with you. The blog is intended for shippers and solution owners, carriers, and data providers as well as sales and presales colleagues who already have a detailed understanding of SAP Business Network for Logistics. 

Amongst others, there are updates in SAP Business Network Freight Collaboration on the invoice rejection scenario. So we will dive into the following question:

But let's s go through them one by one. 

Cross SAP Business Network Freight Collaboration and SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace

Subscribe to release updates on SAP Help Portal

We have enabled the option for you to subscribe to the ‘What’s New’ sections for feature updates that we publish on SAP Help Portal. The release updates on Help Portal are usually published a couple of days prior to this blog series and contain a full list of newly released features. However the list does not including screenshots and additional explanations like this blog does.

If you want to receive the updates from SAP Help Portal, navigate to the ‘What’s New in SAP Business Network for Logistics' and select ‘Subscribe’.

New integration package available – SAP S/4HANA Integration with SAP Business Network for Logistics

Customers who connect to SAP Business Network for Logistics and have their own SAP Cloud Integration tenant can now use the standard integration package, 'SAP S/4HANA Integration with SAP Business Network for Logistics'.

To find this integration package, log on to your SAP Cloud Integration tenant, navigate to ‘Discover’, and search for 'SAP S/4HANA Integration with SAP Business Network for Logistics'. In the Documents tab, you can find detailed documentation on how to establish the connectivity.

 You can also access the integration package in SAP Business Accelerator Hub under the following link:

Integration Flow | SAP S/4HANA Integration with SAP Business Network for Logistics | SAP Business Accelerator Hub

A new property has been added to the Provider API for Order Events

In the Provider API for Order Events (GTT) and Provider API for Order Events (FC), the new property ‘reportedBy’ was added to the event object to specify the source of the event.

Code List Documentation

New value in Event Reason Code Descriptions code list

The Event Reason Code Descriptions code list was enhanced with the following value: INVALID_CARRIER.

The new event reason code ‘invalid carrier’ is supported in the Consumer API for Order Tracking (FC), Provider API for Order Events (FC), Consumer API for Order Tracking (GTT), and Provider API for Order Events (GTT).

SAP Business Network Freight Collaboration

Enhanced design and layout of email notifications

After changes to some notifications in 2402, now the design and layout of the following email notifications has been changed:

  • Freight booking rejection notification
  • Freight booking update notification
  • Freight order rejection notification
  • Freight order update notification
  • Freight request for quotation awarded notification
  • Freight request for quotation cancellation notification
  • New freight request for quotation notification
  • Freight quotation rejection notification
  • Invoice processing failed notification
  • Invoice not yet submitted notification
  • Invoice processed notification for Carrier
  • Invoice not yet submitted notification
  • Invoice processed notification for Shipper
  • Invoice ready for submission notification
  • Dispute resolved by shipper notification
  • Dispute resolved by carrier notification
  • Dispute updated by shipper notification
  • Dispute updated by carrier notification
  • Request for approval notification

All emails related to dock appointment scheduling

Street prefix and suffix can now be captured and displayed across SAP Business Network Freight Collaboration apps and API

Addresses such as '5th Avenue North' can now be managed and displayed properly. In the following applications and APIs, street prefix, street suffix, additional street prefix, and additional street suffix have been added to the business partner addresses:

  • Freight Requests for Quotation
  • Freight Quotations
  • Freight Orders for Confirmation
  • Confirm Freight Bookings (Ocean)
  • Confirm Freight Bookings (Air)
  • Freight Orders for Reporting
  • Consumer API for Freight Subcontracting
  • Consumer API for Freight Tendering
  • Consumer API for Freight Booking
  • Provider API for Freight Booking

Settlement: New API available for carriers to cancel invoices

After the release of ‘cancel invoice with credit memo’ in the 2402 release, now the ‘Provider API for Invoice Cancellation’ is also available.

Settlement: Updates to rejection scenario

We have simplified handing of invoices that raise a dispute due to missing attachments.

When the ordering party rejects a charge item i.e. raises a dispute due to a missing attachment, carriers should now add the attachment along with a note for the disputed charge item. Since the rate amount remained unchanged, the dispute is resolved automatically, and the invoice directly goes to status ‘submitted’ for further processing by the ordering party.

 

 SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace

Sample code for template apps has been deprecated

The template apps for version 2 have been deprecated as of March 16th, 2024. Changes include:

  • The sample codes in GTT repository on Github.com are out of maintenance.

The link to sample codes of template apps is removed from the Model Overview page of the Manage Models app.

We recommend you use Fulfillment Tracking apps for your tracking services. 

If you want to extend the fulfillment tracking apps, e.g. add custom fields, you may utilize the sample code for fulfillment tracking apps. You may also build custom applications from scratch via the ‘Manage Models’ application.

All Fulfillment Tracking apps: Stage-level observation may be deactivated

Let's take a deeper look into what stage-level observation is:

When a tracked process observes another tracked process at stage level, the event correlation follows the following rules:

  • For actual events that can match a planned event in the observing tracked process, they can be correlated to the observing tracked process from the observed tracked process.
  • For actual events that cannot match a planned event in the observing tracked process, only those of the observed stages can be correlated to the observing tracked process from the observed tracked process.

The correlation stops once the arrival event on the last stop of the observed stages is reported for the observed tracked process.

The correlated events from the observed tracked process can be displayed in the timeline or events table of the observing tracked process.

Example:

Events reported on tracking unit level BEFORE planned departure event or AFTER planned destination arrival event of the freight unit, were NOT propagated to the observing freight unit.

Now, solution owners can switch OFF the stage level observation, so all actual events on tracking unit level will be propagated to the observing tracked process (freight unit).

 Stage-level observation applies to the following observation scenarios:

  • Outbound Delivery observes Shipment
  • Inbound Delivery observes Shipment
  • Freight Unit observes Shipment
  • Freight Unit observes Tracking Unit

Shipment observes Tracking Unit

You can find more details on stage-level observation here.

User Assistance – Logistic Service Providers, Carriers and Data Providers

A  new set of videos on carrier integration via API has been published and can be accessed here. With the next update cycle, we also plan to bring these onto SAP Help Portal SAP Business Network Logistics Provider, basic membership, which is our central entry point for logistic service providers.

 --------------------

The above summarizes the key innovations for 2403 We hope you enjoy the new capabilities. Thanks for reading the blog post and stay tuned! 

A full overview of the 2403 release can be found in the following link.

To learn more about SAP Business Network for Logistics visit SAP - Business Network for Logistics.

For further questions and feedback related to the blog, please check the Q&A area and feel free to post your questions in the link with the tag SAP Business Network for Logistics.

entry.title: Re: Archiving - New Functionality in 2011 Release

entry.title: Which settings enables the Tax code in conditions ?
entry.content:
Dear SD/FI experts,

I have checked the community threads and found the answer but it did not help when i tried in the system

I am using ECC and I already know that that tax code appears for MWST condition type in the sales order conditions screen as long as i maintain the same percentage for MWST (condition category D 'tax' in V/06) in trx VK11 and in trx FTXP (under tax code and account key combination)

Now i see that tax code A0 also appears for variant condition type VA00 which is not condition category D (tax) and there is no tax code field in VK11 for VA00 either, and there is nothing against the account key of VA00 (from pricing procedure) in trx FTXP so where is it pulling the tax code from for VA00 ??

Is it from trx OBCL where V0 and A0 are by default maintained against the company code ??

If yes for trx OBCL then why is it not appearing for PR00 then ??

What are the settings which will disable or enable the tax code from appearing in conditions

Best, Ahmed

entry.title: Re: Gestión de efectos: Presentación de remesa
entry.content: Thank you very much. This was the problem

entry.title: Hindi language display problem
entry.content: Even after Hindi language installation and maintained profile parameters also, smart forms are not getting displayed in hindi.

entry.title: Re: Create Adobe form with fragments as a copy of the standard.
entry.content:
I'm afraid there are a couple of things that need correcting here.

1/ You should not be using SFP with HANA Output Management (except for one case), there is now a Fiori app 'Maintain Form Templates'. Upload/download of forms and xdp files happens there. Form transports are also managed with 'Register Extensions For transport' (fiori app).

2/ You do NOT need to copy the callback class to retarget the service, the service assignment is managed on the Form Template. You change the service name on the template. This is supposedly possible in 'Maintain Form Templates', however there is a paradoxical inconsistency in the Fiori app. In this case you make the change in SFP - but that is the only reason to use SFP now.

Michael

Fernando

entry.title: Create SE16H layout without data
entry.content:
Hi!

I want to create a new layout for a ACDOCA table in SE16H. At the moment there are no data in the system so I can't load the table to create a layout.

Is it possible to create a table layout without loading the table itself?

 

BR

Tim

entry.title: Re: Gestion de Bancos/Asistente de Pago, Indicar ejecució...
entry.content:
Hi,

Check below two things on the COPY of the database:

1. Payment order Run Numbering Series. Check whether the same has been defined in the Document Numbering window and applicable to the period.

2. Check for the Maximum Outgoing Payment amount in Step 4. Confirm if that is not a very hugh number.

Kr,

Jitin

entry.title: Re: Ignore Hard coding in S4HANA Cloud
entry.content: This is just hardcode in another place. I need something to change easily in production systems, like stvarv.

entry.title: Re: CAP with Fiori Elements: Side Effects, Custom Actions, Dynamic Expressions
entry.content: Thank you @Ajit_K_Panda for making this topic easy to understand.

entry.title: Re: How to change index columns using VBScript?
entry.content:
Hi,

at first, always enter your PD version and in your case used definition file (DBMS) is also good to know. Not all definition files allow expressions in their indexes. I tested it with Oracle 19c definition file. Expression and Code of index column are connected. Name, Code and DisplayName are read-only attributes, i.e. you cannot modify them directly. You can modify only expression. What you enter into the expresssion, goes to the Code too. At least for Oracle 19c. What is the final goal you are trying to achieve by this? Perhaps there might be different way...

Regards,

Ondrej Divis

entry.title: Enabling Payload message Archiving for SAP NW 750 SP 24 - PO system
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

Our requirement was to enable archiving for Payload messages in SAP PO 7.5 SP24 JAVA system.

As per information and guidelines are available on support portal as well as on SAP blogs, we have enable it on our PO Quality system as part of XML Data Archiving Service for complete adapter engine and our AIX server file system got full (Configuration set on file system) and due to which we need to delete archives manually from AIX O/S end.

Now we are trying execute/generate it again for only Payload related messages and we are getting error as attached in SAP Case and see no messages archived on the file system.

We would need your assistance in proceeding further on this

Question 2: When we initially executed the job and we could see the Messages being archived. But this was archiving all the messages(xi_af_msg). Our requirement is to archive specific  scenario of Payload Messages and tried applying the rule in the configuration for 2nd time when we have executed as mentioned above.

Hence requesting your assistance on this 2 queries/issues which we are facing now.

Regards,

Jahnavi

entry.title: Re: Long DMO runtime for tables which are having LOBs dur...
entry.content:
There should be several ways available to optimize the DMO runtime for tables with LOBs during HANA migration, like increasing SUM tool's parallel processes or Splitting large tables into smaller parts using SUM tool. Also enabling LOB compression pre-migration or using the latest SUM tool version, optimizing network for high data transfer rates, performing preprocessing activities like archiving and deleting unnecessary data pre-migration and checking relevant SAP Notes for known issues and solutions.

Always test these optimizations in a non-production environment first.

entry.title: Re: CDS view from rpsco table - WLP fields in column
entry.content:
Hello @Guillaume_P_FR 

Unfortunately I am no ABAP/SQL Developer... but if you don't have one to ask, the only possibility I see here is that you create 12 views to select always one key figure.

In the end you create one final view with UNION to ingetrate all of them:

https://help.sap.com/doc/abapdocu_750_index_htm/7.50/de-de/abapunion_clause.htm

But I think the better option is to find someone who can code this 😉

Btw. for the other way round, this would be a potential solution:

https://blogs.sap.com/2019/07/16/transpose-or-merge-multiple-rows-in-one-row-cds-views/ 

BR, Martin

entry.title: Re: Destination file error. [CrystalEnterprise.DiskUnmana...
entry.content: This error is usually related to the permissions on the destination folder where the report is being saved. The account running the SAP BusinessObjects service may not have the necessary permissions to write to the destination folder.

entry.title: Re: Not Able to open Account explorer
entry.content:
Hi,

We're also having same issue for the past 5 hrs and no communication from SAP about this downtime/maintenance as such.

entry.title: Re: Not Able to open Account explorer
entry.content: No communication only here something: SAP Cloud Service Status | Cloud Availability Center | SAP Trust Center

entry.title: Re: Important Update: Changes to the Free Tier Option for SAP BTP ABAP Environment
entry.content: Does that mean that the free tier instance can only be used once per global account or will we be able to set up a new free tier instance after the old one has been deleted?

entry.title: Re: Which settings enables the Tax code in conditions ?
entry.content: First check what Account Key is assigned to your condition type which should be available in OB40. Next in OB40, select this Account Key and double click on "Rules" tab where you can see all tax codes assigned to that Account Key. Please your mouse on the tax code which is appearing in VK11 and click on "Rules". There you can see "Tax code" which should have been ticked and that is why, it is appearing in condition record

entry.title: Re: What's your favorite tip for using SAP Build Apps?
entry.content:
Whenever I see someone opening a new Preview window everytime they make a change to their app it really bothers me.

So my tip is that when you save a change to your app, the preview window will automatically update, so no need to open a new window (unless the old one has timed out). 

There does seem to be a slightly different logic flow when you save an app as when you open the window. In these cases you can just refresh the already opened preview page.

entry.title: Re: Calculated coulmn in SAP datasphere
entry.content:
Hello @amithrajkr-1 

I think you want to build a formula like with SUMCT (on the first 2 columns), right?

https://help.sap.com/doc/saphelp_nw75/7.5.5/de-DE/03/17f13a2f160f28e10000000a114084/content.htm

I doubt that this works as of now in Datasphere or in SAC.

The SUMGT can be achieved via a constant selection on the columns but I think for this, there is no workaround?!

I created one Influence Item once for even easier formulas... but still not available:
https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/305629 

BR, Martin

entry.title: Re: Not able to create inbound delivery for PO (STO) in "...
entry.content: Solution: In ID F1705 you can only handle PO's and not STO's.

entry.title: Document is picking different number Range than mestioned in document type
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have an urgent requirement to change number ranges for sales order, delivery billing document and odn for new financial year.

When i checked the number range in the document type it shows 01, but the document is picking 42 number range in vn01, same goes for the delivery and billing document number range.

this is happening for delivery and billing documents aswell. please share your views on this.

Regards,

Siva

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud Advanced filter issue
entry.content:
Hi!

we are facing the following issue:

In stories with story filter/ prompt in import models, we use advanced filters with Story filter utilized. Specifically we use the Date Dimension both in story filter and Advanced Filter. We don't use the System Date, but we create Current Date input control. Stories were functional and working as expected. 

Since last week when editting the story and try to change the advanced filter it filters the System Date and not the Current Date we had previously. It seems that it gets the default selection of System Date.

The correct selection is the following:

and after editting the story and selecting the filter the following:

This occurs in all the tables in the same story utilizing the Story filter (Current Date).

Is there a workaround on that? or is this a known defect?

thank you!

entry.content: Same question here.

Hi, thank you very much for your reply.

I added the event to the channel on S4:

 

but I don't see any events on the event mesh:

 

S4 is on premise and is connected via cloud connector with CPI

what could be the problem?

Does the channel on S4 have to have the same name as the channel on Event Mesh?

Is the workflow supported for the custom tasks? I linked the workflow but it's not getting triggered.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano 

My name is Om Kurkut and I am currently pursuing Bachelor of Engineering in Computer Engineering department.

This is a golden opportunity for students like me and I want to appreciate for this incredible opportunity offered by SAP. As a student, the cost of certification can be exorbitant, difficult to access such valuable learning resources. However, this chance to obtain a SAP certification for free truly underscore its value.

With the P_C4H340_34 cloud Engineer course, I see not just a certification, but an epochal milestone. It's not just about adding a shining badge to my resume; it's more about unlocking doors to great opportunities, shaping my future, and propelling me towards my goals.
Therefore, I extend my heartfelt gratitude. Thank you for your belief in the students like myself, for your investment in our potential, and making our futures bright by such opportunities.

Warm regards,
Om Kurkut

entry.title: Purchase Requisition doesn't create in MDBT but create in MD02
entry.content:
Dear SAP experts,

We found that Purchase requisition doesn't created in MDBT but create in MD02 in one material only.

The material is already at reorder point level, so purchase requisition must created if we run MRP.

We don't use planning file entry for all material.

We also don't set parallel processing in MDBT variant.

We check that user exit  M61X0001 doesn't impact to transaction MDBT.

Our system is SAP ECC 6.0 EHP7.

Why does this happen and what is solution? 

Please help.

 

Thanks and regards,

Anita A.

entry.title: Re: New Hire Onboarding Survey using Custom Task in Onboarding 2.0
entry.content:
Hello,

Is the workflow supported for the custom tasks? I linked the workflow but it's not getting triggered.

Thanks,

Rahul

entry.title: Account in Visit cannot be changed
entry.content:
We have recently experienced the problem that we cannot always change the account within a visit.
Sometimes it can be changed, but usually not.

I could not find a reason for this. Neither the status, nor Responsible, Type or other objects linked to the visit could be identified as the cause for the inability to change the account in the visit.

It can also not be changed via the edit mode or via the DWB

This problem has been occurring recently. Do you have any idea what is causing the problem and how it can be solved that is is possible to change the account all the time within the visit?

entry.title: Re: Convergent Invoice Document Set Printing Lock/Unlock
entry.content:
Nice article!

It's easy enough to send PDF invoices using SAP.

One of our customers who wished to generate Excel invoices used InsightZAP for that purpose.

He was able to automate the process, which saved him a lot of time.

entry.title: Re: CDS returns different result set if I query with filter
entry.content:
Hello @joao_sousa2 

this is a common mistake, I did as well in the beginning 🙂

MAX works only for key figures. But you want to get the highest number in a characteristic, right?

For this you need to work with RANK.

See here some examples:

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/about-row-number-rank-and-dense-rank-functions-in-sap-hana/ba-p/13408147

BR, Martin

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content: Thanks for the welcome 🙂

entry.title: Has anyone made a step-by-step tutorial for abap-platform-trial in Docker (windows)
entry.content:
Is there a step to step guide for people that really don't understand Docker.

On hub.docker.com it says. "Before you pull the image you must understand this and that about Docker":

I just want to test ABAP and do not want to wast more than necessary of my limited brain capacity on Docker. To me Docker is just a necessary evil to be able to run the ABAP trial.

Is any help available for someone like me?

The very best and kindest regards
Thomas Madsen Nielsen

entry.title: How to control quote page via keyboard on the CPQ application?
entry.content:
Hey Readers,

I hope you all are doing great 😉

In this article, I will share a small tip to access the quote list page using the keyboard. I know you may think, "I can easily access it via up or down arrows on the keyboard." However, you can access those actions only via the tab key on your keyboard. If you don't like to use a keyboard, you can also use your mouse.

At first, you should enable the Enable Accessibility Features parameter on your user page. 

 

If you want to see what the quote list page looks like, please refer to the following image:

Also, you can access the quote action items via tab key, Up arrow and down arrow keys. In the following image, Edit, view, delete etc. are quote action items.

Note: Accessing quote action items via keyboard is only available on quote 2.0 engine.

I hope this small tip may help you.

Thank you for reading this article 🙂

Best Regards,

Abirami Karthikeyan

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)

As a student, the cost of certification can often be prohibitive, making access to such valuable learning resources challenging. However, the chance to obtain a SAP certification for free truly highlights its significance.

With the C_SAC_2402 Data Analytics course, I perceive not just a certification, but a monumental milestone. It transcends merely adding a prestigious badge to my resume; it symbolizes unlocking doors to endless opportunities, shaping my future trajectory, and propelling me closer to my aspirations.

Thus, I want to express my sincere appreciation. Thank you for believing in students like myself, for investing in our potential, and for brightening our futures through such opportunities.

Warm Wishes!!!Yash.

entry.title: Re: Gestion de Bancos/Asistente de Pago, Indicar ejecució...
entry.content: The serial number is well defined (in 2024 and the numbering is correct 240000, last number 240543) and they are not particularly large remittances, neither in the number of payments, nor in the total amount. We have made many with more payments and more amounts.

entry.title: Restriction of transaction code
entry.content:
We are localizing an authorization and role for support users when functional test the transaction codes there were data's that can view  globally.

We understand that not all transaction code has the restriction for organization level.

Sample is for tcode OBY6 functional can see data from other countries and we have checked in Su24 there is no auth obj being pulled and one is for SE16 we understand that this can be limit only based on the table auth group.

Is there a possibility to restrict certain transaction codes on specific country only? These involved mostly with IT Support tcodes?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Restriction of transaction code
entry.content:
Hello,

as soon the tcode performs a check on the 'country', you can delimit the access accordingly. If there is none such check, you can check, whether the application provides the possibility to invent own checks (user exit, badi, etc.)

As last possibility you could modify the standard and enter own checks.

To avoid such modifications, you still can use copies of the standard coding and change the copy only. Then assign only the customer own t-codes to the support IDs.

 

The example of OBY6 is a special one, as this is a parameter transaction for SM30, so the possibilities are even more limited. S_TABU_LIN provides the possibility to filter table content by line. But only for fields which are key fields (see also SAP KBA 1832365 ). But 'country' is no key field in table t000. So you could create a new parameter transaction, where you pre-fill the selection screen with the desired country already.

 

b.rgds,
Bernhard

entry.title: Re: SAP Build IRPA not recognize screen on virtual machine
entry.content:
We solved our issue by restarting the remote desktop and refraining from connecting to it altogether. Subsequently, the processes are now running smoothly. 

Furthermore, we noticed that if we reconnect to the remote desktop, the processes start crashing.

entry.title: Change content of BRFplus structure with procedure call
entry.content:
Hi all

I have a rule (RUL_ENH_MAT) in BRFplus which has structure Z_MAT_CUST_INFO which has some substructures.

In that rule I have a procedure call and in that procedure call I call a static method in a class where I basically have some complex logic to update some fields in some substructures of structure Z_MAT_CUST_INFO. 

In that class/method I have Z_MAT_CUST_INFO as changing parameter and in the procedure call I have Z_MAT_CUST_INFO as result, but somehow when executing the rule, Z_MAT_CUST_INFO does not get updated (but it does when simulating the procedure call).

Any idea?

Thank you

entry.title: Unable to access SAP BTP Global Account
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are unable to access SAP BTP Global Account and getting the below issue.

Could you please give us any suggestion and help us on this issue.

Thanks,

Rupesh

entry.title: Re: Material advance planning status marked 'Not relevant for planning' after upgrade 2022 version
entry.content:
1. Configuration Check: Ensure that all relevant configuration settings are consistent between your test and production environments. Sometimes, post-upgrade, certain settings might revert to defaults or new configurations may be introduced.

  2. Master Data Sync: Verify that the master data (especially material master data) is synchronized between the two systems. Differences in material master settings can lead to varied behavior in planning functionalities.

  3. User Role and Authorization: Confirm that the user roles and authorizations are the same in both environments, as differences here might affect the visibility or functionality of new features post-upgrade.

  4. Patch Levels: Check if both systems are on the same patch level post-upgrade. Sometimes, subsequent patches can fix unexpected behaviors introduced by the upgrade.

  5. Consult SAP Notes: Look for any SAP Notes or Knowledge Base Articles related to the upgrade and the specific issue you are facing. SAP often releases notes that address common issues encountered after an upgrade.         Best laparoscopic surgeon

entry.title: Re: Cancel/Delete SAP note
entry.content: Hello Sandra.

entry.title: Lead approval step process notification issue in Arabic language
entry.content:
Hii all, when logged in Arabic, lead approval notification are not correctly translated.

In English notification appears as lead new registration 2724 approved

In Arabic notification appears as "system_Lead_Text&New Registration (2724) 

Can anyone help me how to resolve this issue.

entry.title: Re: Cancel/Delete SAP note
entry.content: Sorry for this

entry.title: The credit check is not preformed for the sales scheduling agreement
entry.content:
We have configured the credit check for Sales order - scope item BD9. However when we create a scheduling agreement the credit check status is 'Not Performed'. How do we setup the credit check for scope item 3NR?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: The credit check is not preformed for the sales sched...
entry.content:
Please check that the credit settings have been configured correctly against the sales document type and item category in the following SSCUIs:

  • Set Credit Limit Checks for Sales Document Types - 102137
  • Determine Active Receivables Per Item Category - 102571

entry.title: Re: SAP Java Buildpack 2: Jakarta-Based, Fresh and New!
entry.content:
Hi @gergana_tsakova ,

thanks for sharing! We want to upgrade some JAVA CloudFoundry BTP apps, which are currently using TomEE7 with SAP JAVA Buildpack 1.x, to TomEE9. When is the support for TomEE9 in SAP JAVA Buildpack 2.x planned? It would be great if you can give us a hint about the roadmap plans?

Thanks!

Michael

entry.title: Re: Hindi language display problem
entry.content:
1) They "are not...", but what do they look like then?

2) Did you log in Hindi to do the test?

3) The language of some Smart Forms may depend on the country of the recipient, so which Smart Form did you try?

entry.title: Re: Learning Hub Subscription Purchasing Error (VAL_0101)
entry.content: it looks like learning hub purchase is allowed only for partners or SAP learning partners.
